title: Most AI agents are fake (here's a 10-second test)
summary: Jeff Su argues that most commercial AI agents are mislabeled, proposing a simple test: outputs that are newly generated content (text, images, video) indicate genuine generative AI and agents, while classification and probabilistic outputs do not. He contrasts Gmail's spam filter with Google Docs' text generation and notes that true agents require autonomous iteration.
